prompt: Create a dark gothic fine-art portrait in a vertical 9:16 canvas: one pale adult woman lies supine like an ornate funeral tableau, surrounded by a dense, nearly continuous carpet of deep burgundy-black roses and dark foliage. She wears an elaborate black Victorian mourning gown with high neck, long lace sleeves, embroidered floral appliqué, sheer panels, layered satin and tulle, and intricate beadwork. Her long black hair spreads around her head; one ear with delicate earrings is visible, while her face is intentionally covered by a centered soft-edged square blur/censor block in muted brown tones. Pose: one hand rests on her torso, the other arm extends down to the side, body angled slightly diagonally from upper center to lower center. Surround her with three clearly visible antique objects among the roses: one dark ornate book with a metal cross emblem at the lower right, one gilded picture-frame edge at the left side, and one small metallic crucifix or decorative cross near the roses. Use a moody low-key chiaroscuro lighting setup with very deep shadows, subtle highlights on lace, skin, and rose petals, a muted palette of black, oxblood, antique gold, and charcoal, hyper-detailed texture, romantic gothic opulence, cinematic realism, top-down composition, solemn atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
